sections.heading: Lead
sections.content: Lei Bin (雷斌; onyomi: Rai Hin) is an original character in Dynasty Warriors: Godseekers. His style name is Shībó (onyomi: Shihaku).

sections.heading: Role in Game
sections.content: Lei Bin is Zhao Yun's childhood friend who helps break the seal binding Lixia. He is a fan of heroic exploits and ancient legends, enthusiastically explaining the hotshots of the era to his friend. He travels with Zhao Yun and Lixia to find the latter's mystic gems scattered during her release.

sections.heading: Development
sections.content: Lei Bin is included in the game to provide another perspective to the story and prevent romantic interactions between Zhao Yun and Lixia.

sections.heading: Personality
sections.content: Armed with a curious and rational mind, Lei Bin is an observant lad.

sections.heading: Gameplay
sections.content:
Despite wielding a unique weapon, Lei Bin's attacks are mostly derived from the crossbow moveset.

Movement Flexibility: Allows for more mobility by ignoring an enemy unit's zone of control.

Approaching Star (近星; lit. "Nearing Star"): Hits a single foe in range. Based on the crossbow moveset's second charge string from Dynasty Warriors 8.

Heartful Star (心星; lit. "Heart Star"): Hits a single foe in range. Lowers enemy's mobility by 1. Based on the crossbow moveset's fourth charge string from Dynasty Warriors 8.

Solar Fan (九星扇; lit. "Flying Star Fan"): Hits multiple foes in range. Based on the crossbow moveset's fifth charge string from Dynasty Warriors 8.

Cosmic Cannon (迸星砲; lit. "Bursting Star Shot"): Hits multiple foes in range. Based on the crossbow moveset's sixth charge string from Dynasty Warriors 8.

Approaching Star EX (近星Ex; lit. "Nearing Star EX"): Hits a single foe in range. Lowers enemy's defense by 10%. Based on the crossbow moveset's fifth charge string and Lianshi's second EX attack from Dynasty Warriors 8, though the water ripple effects have been omitted.

Solar Fan EX (九星扇Ex; lit. "Flying Star Fan EX"): Hits multiple foes in range. Has a chance of paralyzing enemies. Based on the crossbow moveset's fifth charge string and Lianshi's first EX attack from Dynasty Warriors 8, though the latter fires electric arrows on the ground instead.

Chaotic Dreams (開物成夢; lit. "Discovery Realization Dream"): Hits multiple foes in range. In terms of animation, Lei Bin pulls out a second bowgun and rapidly fires an array of arrows towards his targets.

Creation Blast (志創堅固; lit. "Spirit Creation Materialization"): Hits multiple foes in range. Has a chance of fainting enemies. In terms of animation, Lei Bin uses two bowguns to fire several golden projectiles in a semi-radial pattern, then turns around while shooting to make the barrage more circular.

Heavenly Knowledge (天長地究; lit. "Heaven-Long Earth Studies"): Hits surrounding foes. Has a chance of paralyzing enemies. Based on Lianshi's Storm Wave Musou attack from Dynasty Warriors 8, though the arrows fired are not water-based.

Synchro Finisher: After finishing a synchronized attack with the whole party, Lei Bin turns around once before firing one last shot at the enemy.

First Strike: Increases strength by 50% and mobility by 2 for one turn only.

Close Quarters: Increases defense against close-range attacks, but weakens it against long-range attacks.

Remoteness: Increases defense against long-range attacks, but weakens it against close-range attacks.

Swift Foot: Increases mobility by 1.

Fearless Leader: Increases critical hit rate when allied morale is low.

Musou Master: Increases attack strength of Musou attacks.

Relentless: Increases the effect of state reductions when the character attacks the enemy by 5%.

Relentless Duo: Increases the effect of state reductions when the character attacks the enemy by 10%.

Relentless Ultra: Increases the effect of state reductions when the character attacks the enemy by 20%.

Stun Effect: Occasionally induces enemies into a stunned state with attacks.

Frighten Effect: Occasionally induces enemies into a frightened state with attacks.

Burn Effect: Occasionally induces enemies into a burnt state with attacks.

Freeze Effect: Occasionally induces enemies into a frozen state with attacks.

Shock Effect: Occasionally induces enemies into a shocked state with attacks.

Poison Effect: Occasionally induces enemies into a poisoned state with attacks.

Enfeeble: Reduces the enemy's Musou gauge by 50%.

Recovery: Restores the health of the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square by 5% at the start of each turn.

Recovery Duo: Restores the health of the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square by 10% at the start of each turn.

Recovery Ultra: Restores the health of the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square by 15% at the start of each turn.

Purification: Removes influences from the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square with a success rate of 50% at the start of each turn.

Strength Vessel: Increases the strength of the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square by 5%.

Defense Vessel: Increases the defense of the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square by 5%.

Dexterity Vessel: Increases the dexterity of the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square by 5%.

Agility Vessel: Increases the agility of the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square by 5%.

Spirit Vessel: Increases the spirit of the unit and any allied units within 1 adjacent square by 5%.

Furor: Increases the energy of units in Synchro Mode.

Bolt: Increases the mobility of units in Synchro Mode.

Health Springs: Increases the amount of health restored by 20%.

Musou Springs: Increases the amount of Musou restored by 20%.

Learner: Increases experience earned by 30%.

Learner Duo: Increases experience earned by 50%.

Learner Ultra: Increases experience earned by 100%.

Flurry: Increases the charge during attacks by 10%.

Flurry Duo: Increases the charge during attacks by 30%.

Flurry Ultra: Increases the charge during attacks by 50%.

Merciless: Enables character to occasionally defeat an enemy unit in a single attack.

sections.heading: Fighting Style
sections.content: Lei Bin starts as a rifle user, and he can't attack enemies in any square immediately adjacent to him. Some of his attacks are taken from the crossbow moveset. He can provide cover fire from three squares away from him.
